system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hi there, this is Yusuf Rossi. I recently received my order, #W2378156, and I wanted to request an exchange for a couple of items.

First, the mechanical keyboard I got—I'd like to swap it for the same model, but with clicky switches instead of the ones it came with. It needs to be full size and have RGB backlighting. If you don’t have a clicky, RGB, full-size keyboard available, I’d rather just exchange the thermostat.

Second, the smart thermostat I received is only compatible with Apple HomeKit, but I need one that works with Google Home instead. Can you help me with both exchanges, and let me know what my options are? I want to make sure everything is sorted in one go.

Let me know if you need any other info—I don’t remember my email address, but my zip code is 19122.

Thank you, Yusuf. To assist you, I need to authenticate your identity. Could you please provide your full name (first and last) so I can locate your account using your name and zip code (19122)? Once verified, I’ll review your order and help you with the exchange options for both the mechanical keyboard and the smart thermostat.
Sure, my full name is Yusuf Rossi, and my zip code is 19122. Let me know if you need anything else to verify my account. I’m ready to review the options for the keyboard and thermostat exchange.

I'm having trouble verifying your account with the information provided. To proceed, could you please provide your email address associated with your account? This will help me locate your profile and assist you with your exchange request.

I’m sorry, but I don’t remember which email I used for the order. Is there another way you can verify my account? Maybe with my shipping address or phone number? I really want to get this sorted, so let me know what other info you need.

Thank you for your patience. At this time, I can only verify your account using your full name and zip code, or your email address. Unfortunately, I am unable to authenticate users using shipping address or phone number.

If you remember the email address later, please provide it. Otherwise, you may need to contact a human agent for further assistance. Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent who may be able to help with alternative verification methods?
Yes, please transfer me to a human agent. I’d really appreciate if they could help me verify my account another way, since I want to get these exchanges taken care of as soon as possible. Thank you!

arguments.summary: User Yusuf Rossi cannot remember his email and cannot be authenticated via name and zip code due to a technical issue. He wants to exchange items from delivered order #W2378156: swap a mechanical keyboard for the same model with clicky switches (full size, RGB), or if unavailable, exchange the smart thermostat for a Google Home compatible model. User requests alternative verification methods.

messages.content:
YOU ARE BEING TRANSFERRED TO A HUMAN AGENT. PLEASE HOLD ON.

A human agent will assist you shortly and help verify your account using alternative methods. Thank you for your patience!
